Reflections

Quick Intro

Passionate about creating meaningful digital experiences that bridge the gap between user needs and business objectives. With a strong foundation in design thinking and modern development practices, I believe great interfaces should be intuitive, accessible, and delightful to use.

My Journey
My journey began in 2018 with a simple question: why do some websites feel intuitive while others frustrate users? This curiosity led me down a rabbit hole of design principles, user psychology, and the beautiful intersection of art and technology. I started with basic HTML and CSS, slowly building my foundation in web development.

The real transformation came during the pandemic in 2020 when the world went digital. This forced me to think deeply about user experiences and accessibility. I immersed myself in learning React, studying design systems, and understanding how to create interfaces that work seamlessly across all devices and abilities.

Through countless hours of prototyping, testing, and iterating, I discovered that great design isn't just about aesthetics—it's about solving real problems for real people. Every pixel placement, every interaction, every decision tells a story and guides users through their digital journey.

Today, I see myself not just as a designer or developer, but as an advocate for users. I've learned to balance user needs with business objectives, aesthetic beauty with functional simplicity, and creative innovation with established patterns. My focus has evolved to creating inclusive, accessible designs that serve everyone.

This journey has taught me that empathy is the most powerful tool in a designer's toolkit. Understanding user pain points, conducting thorough research, and iterating based on feedback have become second nature. Every project I work on is an opportunity to make digital experiences more meaningful and accessible.

Future

The future of UI/UX is incredibly exciting. With emerging technologies like AI, VR/AR, and voice interfaces, the canvas for creating experiences is expanding exponentially. I'm committed to staying at the forefront of these changes, always learning, always growing, and always putting the user at the center of everything I create.

Endorsements

Riya Sharma has shown strong clarity in user psychology and interface structuring. Her projects consistently demonstrated research-backed decisions and a refined design process. She is disciplined, creative, and highly focused on delivering meaningful user experiences.

Prof. Meera Kulkarni

Faculty Mentor

PES University

Riya stood out for her ability to convert conceptual ideas into practical UI layouts. Her presentation and documentation skills were exceptionally clear, and she maintained a user-first approach in every assignment. She is dependable, hardworking, and a quick learner.

Dr. Sanjay Patil

HOD, Department of Computer Applications

PES University

Riya brings both creativity and analytical thinking to the table. Her persona development, usability testing, and workflow mapping were always thorough. She is a promising UI/UX professional who understands both design theory and application.

Prof. Nisha Rao

UX Research Faculty

PES University, Bengaluru

Working with Riya has always been inspiring. She brings fresh concepts, clean layouts, and strong collaboration energy. Her understanding of visual balance and typography makes her designs polished and easy to work with.

Kedar Varghese

Fellow Designer

PES University

Riya guided me through several college design sprints and always encouraged experimentation. She explains design logic clearly and ensures everyone in the team is aligned. Her leadership and patience make group work much easier.

Arjun Menon

Junior Designer (Project Team)

PES University

Riya has been active in design clubs and student projects. She contributed detailed UX case studies and helped streamline many group workflows. She is supportive, friendly, and someone everyone enjoys working with.

Shreya Desai

Student Coordinator

PES University

Riya completed her internship under my supervision, and she quickly adapted to real-world design challenges. Her redesign of our onboarding flow improved user clarity and reduced friction. She is responsible, detail-oriented, and highly dependable.

Rahul Shetty

Product Design Lead

PixelCraft Studio, Bengaluru

Riya demonstrates excellent communication and professionalism. She consistently delivered polished UI screens, aligned with requirements, and incorporated feedback effectively. Her dedication and design clarity made collaboration seamless.

Project Manager
